Darren,

 

The Sheriff’s boat is approved for a ride but they
will need a copy of JE’s DL for access into the port
for some reason.  I did find out the Sheriff’s boat
only does 37 knots (42 mph) due to the bullet proof
glass, a crane, generator, etc, etc.
